title: medicago littoralis subsp. longiseta
intro: Medicago littoralis subsp. longiseta, also known as a variant of the bird's foot trefoil, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant is said to help alleviate digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as provide relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Medicago littoralis subsp. longiseta can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to support overall well-being.
